title: IssuerMetadata
description: Metadata about the issuer of an ExecutionProof. Used by verifiers to discover the issuer's public keys, trust status, and key-rotation policy. Protocol version 1.0.0.

issuer_id.description: The unique identifier of the issuer. Stable across key rotations.

issuer_type.description: The type of issuer. 'authority_broker' = the issuer is an authority broker such as actenon-permit. 'resource_owner' = the issuer is the resource owner self-issuing (resource_owned mode). 'delegated_signer' = the issuer is a delegated signing service.

method.description: The key discovery method. 'well_known' = fetch from .well-known/actenon-issuer/<issuer_id>. 'embedded' = key material is embedded in the proof. 'external_registry' = fetch from a configured external registry.

well_known_url.description: Required when method is 'well_known'. The URL to fetch the issuer's key set and status.

embedded_key.description: Required when method is 'embedded'. The public key material embedded in the proof.

trust_status.description: Optional. The issuer's trust status as known at proof-issuance time. The verifier MUST re-fetch the current status before honouring the proof.

key_rotation_policy.description: Optional. The issuer's key rotation policy.
